case_title: ZHEN, XU YOU (A.K.A. ELKI ZHEN) VS AGUILAR, REYNA A.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHEN, XU YOU (A.K.A. ELKI ZHEN) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, REYNA A. $4,528.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,603.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5660.00 AND ATTRIBUTES 20% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,770.00 FILED BY ZHEN, XU YOU (A.K.A. ELKI ZHEN) AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, REYNA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO DEFT RETURNED.

PLTFF'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; $10 FEE PAID; TO FOLDER/TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-23-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-20-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
POS FILED ON PLTF'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT OF HRG PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO: AGUILAR, REYNA A.
